title: stegnogramma wilfordii
intro: Stegnogramma wilfordii, also known as Dangshen, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of China, belonging to the family Compositae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Stegnogramma wilfordii include improving circulation, reducing blood pressure, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are consumed to promote overall well-being and longevity.
